name: doc-superpowers
description: Documentation orchestrator for Claude Code: generates, audits, and maintains project docs through parallel agent dispatch, agentic workflow discovery, diagram generation, and spec lifecycle tracking
author: Woodrow Pearson

skills.name: doc-superpowers
skills.description: Use when documentation is missing, stale, or inconsistent with code — or when auditing doc freshness, reviewing PR doc impact, managing formal specs/ADRs, setting up doc automation hooks, or drafting release notes. Also use when the user mentions doc quality, stale docs, architecture docs, spec tracking, design-to-spec conversion, or release notes.
